message:
fix: write last_indexed_at after index completion so status displays correctly

The status command reads `last_indexed_at` from the meta table, but the
indexer only wrote `last_scan_ts`. This caused `cass status` to always
show "Last indexed: unknown" even after successful indexing.

Closes #34

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
